subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Nearness to Thee is my hope, pardon from Thee my desire, Thy good-pleasure with me my aspiration, and forgiveness from Thee my highest and most cherished aim
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قربک رجائی و عفوک املی و رضائک بغیتی و غفرانک منتهی مطلبی اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God
